pi_items.source: Task description line 5: 'Create and save a Power BI report named Monthly_Trend_Forecast.pbix'
Task description explicitly requires 'A Line Chart showing Sales_Amount by Sale_Date' and 'An Area Chart showing Running_Total measure'
Task description: 'A DAX measure named exactly Running_Total that calculates the cumulative sum of Sales_Amount'
Task description: 'you must enable a Trend Line AND a Forecast from the Analytics pane'; verified via Microsoft Learn documentation on Power BI Analytics pane

File exists at benchmarks/cua_world/environments/power_bi_desktop_env/data/sales_data.csv with 1000 data rows and columns: Product_ID, Sale_Date, Sales_Rep, Region, Sales_Amount, Quantity_Sold, Product_Category, Unit_Cost, Unit_Price, Customer_Type, Discount, Payment_Method, Sales_Channel, Region_and_Sales_Rep

privileged_info_summary: The monthly_trend_forecast task requires creating a Power BI Desktop report named Monthly_Trend_Forecast.pbix using sales_data.csv (1000 rows, synthetic sales transaction data from 2023-01-01 to 2024-01-01). The report must contain a Line Chart and Area Chart visualization showing sales trends with a DAX measure called Running_Total that calculates cumulative sum of Sales_Amount by Sale_Date. The Line Chart must include trend line and forecast analytics enabled from Power BI's Analytics pane. All claimed metadata values accurately reflect the task requirements and are consistent with Microsoft Power BI Desktop features which support Analytics pane with trend lines and forecasts.
